text_excerpt: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me News All Local News Campaigns Newsletter National Global Summer School 2026 May 1, 2026 My March Newsletter April 7, 2026 Inclusivity in Sports March 20, 2026 Social Media Survey March 11, 2026 My February Newsletter March 6, 2026 The Situation in Iran and the Middle East March 3, 2026 SEND Reform Proposals February 23, 2026 January Update on Gaza February 9, 2026 My January Newsletter February 2, 2026 New Years Newsletter January 13, 2026 Update on Gaza: Ceasefire, Humanitarian Aid, and Accountability December 8, 2025 My November Newsletter December 2, 2025 Sign the petition for Safer Roads in Sprowston November 17, 2025 SEND in Norwich North November 13, 2025 My October Newsletter November 7, 2025 Christmas Card Competition 2025 November 1, 2025 Pride in Place - Have Your Say October 10, 2025 My September Newsletter October 6, 2025 Some BIG Announcements - Lab25 October 3, 2025 My August Newsletter September 3, 2025 MY PROMISE TO YOU Trust in politics is at an all-time low and I can understand why many people simply don’t feel politics works for them. I will work my hardest to restore trust and show that politicians are not all the same. That’s why I have been out and about speaking to so many people across Norwich North to hear your concerns. As your MP, I will, Be your strong voice in parliament – speaking up on the issues that matter to you. Be a full-time MP – unlike many, I would never take a second job. Always listen to you – I’ll hold regular constituency surgeries as well as being visible and accessible. Champion our great county and fine city – I’m proud to be from Norfolk and will stand up for investment in our area. And I’ll always be honest with you – I won’t make promises I can’t keep. Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North Facebook Twitter Instagram Promoted by David Fullman on behalf of Alice Macdonald MP both at St Marks Church Hall, Hall Road, Norwich, NR1 3HL.
